===Pokémon Adventures===
==== {{MangaArc|Scarlet & Violet}} ====
Ortega debuted in <!--[[PASV33]]-->the {{MangaArc|Scarlet & Violet}}. Shortly after they arrived at the [[Ruchbah Squad's Base]], {{Violet}} and {{adv|Arven}} found Ortega surrounded by several {{tc|Team Star Grunt}}s rebelling against [[Team Star]]. Although the Grunts managed to sneak up on him, Ortega's skill as a Trainer meant he was far too powerful for them to actually defeat. The Grunts refused to back down, stating that if Team Star kept losing their bases to Violet's raids, the group's reputation as a threat would be shattered. Ortega said he'd be fine with stepping down, but only on the condition that he'd be allowed to take his belongings with him.

To the Grunts' confusion, Ortega began stripping the base clean and dismantling it, noting that the items used to build the place actually belonged to him. He told the Grunts that if they wanted to make a new version of Team Star that people wouldn't look down on, they'd have to do it themselves. Defeated, the Grunts gave up their rebellion and left without a fight. When the loyal Grunts that remained worried about where they could stay, Ortega explained that he never truly intended on stepping down and the base would always be their home. He then accepted Violet's challenge and agreed to have a battle.
{{-}}
